name: Generic Password Dumper Activity on LSASS Detected
description: Detects process handle requests and access to the LSASS process with specific access masks, indicative of potential credential dumping.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID (4656 or 4663).

parameters.name: process_guid
parameters.description: The GUID of the process requesting or attempting access.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process requesting or attempting access.

parameters.name: TargetObjectName
parameters.description: The name of the target object, which should be 'lsass.exe'.

parameters.name: AccessMask
parameters.description: The hexadecimal access mask used in the request or attempt.

parameters.name: granted_access_list
parameters.description: A list of access rights granted to the process (e.g., PROCESS_VM_READ).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account associated with the process activity.
